# Copilot Instructions

Use `CLAUDE.md` in the repository root as the single source of truth for project-specific instructions.

- Read `CLAUDE.md` before making changes.
- Follow `CLAUDE.md` when it is more specific than general defaults.
- Write any project-instruction updates to `CLAUDE.md` instead of duplicating them here.
- Assume `CLAUDE.md` contains the current conventions, architecture notes, workflows, and maintenance guidance for this repository.
